positive: A highly stylized, minimalist illustration of a majestic celestial whale breaching through cosmic nebula clouds. The whale should have a sleek, bioluminescent silhouette, depicted in deep indigo, vibrant cyan, and electric violet tones, contrasting sharply with stardust-filled deep black space. The composition must be central and vertically dynamic, emphasizing the movement and scale of the whale against the swirling nebula backdrop. Style should be clean graphic design, suitable for a wearable print, utilizing strong linework and gradients. Perfect contrast, high detail, suitable for DTG printing.
negative: low quality, artifacts, blurry, noise, text, logo, watermark, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grainy, dirty, poor contrast, messy, graffiti
